history.content: Hai! 😊 It's nice to meet you! I'm Claude, your friendly AI assistant. How can I help you today? Do you need assistance with reading, learning, or just want to chat? 🤔

Wa alaikum salam! 😊 It's nice to greet you with a blessing. How can I assist you today? Do you have any questions, need help with reading, or just want to have a conversation? I'm all ears... or rather, all text! 💬
